chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-2478 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing 1. For order on office objections 1 to 4. 2. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 19.08.2025 Mr. Muhammad Umar Panhwar, Advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Ali Haider Saleem, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh. Mr. K.A. Vaswani, Assistant Advocate General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Learned counsel for the petitioners under instructions does not press this petition and submits that he will file bail application before the regular Bench of this Court. Order accordingly. The petition stands dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
